NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar May-20-2011 Reset To Jun-01-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: none present.

Petitioner: Jesse H. McClure, present in pro per.

Respondent: was not present.

There being no service on the Respondent, the Court continued the matter to June 1, 2011 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204, and reissued the TRO (reissuance signed).

Reissuance expires: June 1, 2011.
